title: Ant Control in University Heights, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in University Heights, Bronx. Effective treatments for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: University Heights residents face unique ant control challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings and single-family homes. Our professional ant control services target common species including pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants that frequently invade kitchens and bathrooms in this historic Bronx community. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective treatments priced between $350-$550 to eliminate ant colonies and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served University Heights for years, understanding the specific pest pressures facing buildings near Bronx Community College and along University Avenue. Our licensed technicians use safe, family-friendly treatments tailored to the multi-family dwellings and residential properties that define this vibrant neighborhood.
localContext: University Heights' older architecture and proximity to green spaces like Macombs Dam Park create ideal conditions for ant activity, especially during warmer months. From the historic buildings near Hall of Fame Terrace to apartments along Sedgwick Avenue, we've helped countless University Heights properties achieve lasting ant control.

faqs.question: Why are ants so common in University Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: University Heights' many pre-war buildings have cracks, gaps, and shared walls that allow ants to travel between units. Food sources, moisture from older plumbing, and the neighborhood's density create ideal conditions for ant colonies to thrive and spread throughout multi-family buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in University Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to University Heights residents. Our Bronx-based technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the infestation and begin treatment, with most ant control services completed in a single visit.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 ant control service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection to locate ant colonies and entry points, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, crack and crevice sealing where applicable, exterior perimeter treatment, and a 30-day warranty. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in integrated pest management techniques that minimize chemical use while maximizing effectiveness. We provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed after treatment.
